description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 5. Completion markers and completed-observation lifecycle**.

Goal: add regression coverage proving completion state survives observation, reflection, and later consolidation instead of disappearing or being folded back into active work.

Relevant test surfaces:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-reflection.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/integration/observation-cycle-threshold.test.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/unit/engine-build-context.test.ts`
- extension-level lifecycle tests under `packages/pi-om-extension/src/__tests__/extension`

Worker notes:
- include examples for completed items, resolved blockers, and abandoned/superseded work
- assertions should check durable rendered output and task-state fields, not only raw LLM text parsing
- this ticket is a foundation for later Tier 2 lifecycle/gap/robustness work, so prefer scenarios other tickets can build on
title: Add regression coverage so completion state survives reflection and consolidation
